title: Genomics-driven discovery of microbial natural products
research_overview: Microbial genomics reveals far greater biosynthetic potential than traditional screening
Integration of genomics and bioinformatics with experimental validation
Discovery of novel antibiotics and bioactive compounds
Overcoming antibiotic resistance crisis through BGC mining

drug_discovery_context.fda_approval: Microbial metabolites major source of clinical drugs
drug_discovery_context.antibiotic_crisis: No novel antibiotic scaffolds 1962-2000; productivity crisis

genomics_approach.advantage: Access to vast untapped biosynthetic potential
genomics_approach.efficiency: Higher discovery rate of novel scaffolds

biosynthetic_gene_cluster_applications: Identification of novel BGCs with unknown products
pathway_specific_approaches: Type I and II polyketide synthase activation
